'''For'o''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] who fought in the Bothan navy at the time of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
When [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] sided with [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and the [[Confederation]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] against the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], its navy joined the growing Confederation fleet. Admiral For'o was known to have served at the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]] where Confederation forces engaged the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]] threatening the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The Admiral was later credited by [[Tojjelnoot]], a leading [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] official, for aiding in the defense of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
